name: Pork, Eggplant, and Tomato
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Eggplant, sliced -OR- 1/2 large Eggplant, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare ingredients. Marinate pork in salt and soy sauce for 5 minutes.
2. Heat oil to smoking point in wok. Add pork and onions. Stir fry pork until browned, about 5 minutes. Add eggplant, tomatoes, and sugar. Cover wok. Cook ingredients for 15 minutes, lifting cover occasionally to stir ingredients.
NOTE: This could be made into a purely vegetarian dish by omitting the pork. Stir fry the eggplant and onions first, then add the tomatoes.
